title: French Pilaf with Seeds
description: A simple and flavorful French-inspired pilaf dish with crunchy seeds, perfect for a quick snack or side.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped carrots and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the Russian wheat berries and stir to combine.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the wheat berries start to brown.
Add the chopped almonds and black seeds. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
Transfer to a serving dish and garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
